failedAssertions.reason: Dashboard Approval page has critical accessibility gaps: (1) one button has no accessible name (empty text, no aria-label/title). (2) zero buttons carry aria-label attributes. (3) all 4 filter select/comboboxes are unlabeled (no aria-label, id, name, or associated label). (4) no live-region elements (aria-live, role=alert, role=status) exist, so screen readers cannot announce status changes. Keyboard navigation passes because interactive elements are native focusable controls.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated VAL-DASH-019 issue text with fresh findings from round 6 flow validator
